title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at PGIMER

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at PGIMER
jsonLd.description:
PGIMER, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PGIMER:
PGIMER is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PGIMER!
